commands.cmd:
pid=4242
if [ "$pid" -le 0 ]; then
  pat=''
  [ -n "$pat" ] || exit 1
  pid=$(pgrep -f -- "$pat" 2>/dev/null | head -n 1)
  [ -n "$pid" ] || exit 1
fi
raw=$(jstat -gc "$pid") || exit 1
used=$(printf '%s\n' "$raw" | awk '
  NR==1 { for (i=1;i<=NF;i++) col[$i]=i; next }
  NR==2 {
    for (k in needed) if (!(needed[k] in col)) { printf ""; exit }
    u = $(col["EU"]) + $(col["OU"]) + $(col["MU"])
    c = $(col["EC"]) + $(col["OC"]) + $(col["MC"])
    if (c > 0) printf "%.1f", u/c*100; else printf ""
  }
  BEGIN { split("EU OU MU EC OC MC", needed, " ") }')
[ -n "$used" ] || exit 1
printf '{"heap_used_pct":%s}' "$used"
